DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 74619347) (TRANSACTION ID # 74619347)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-17-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE EDDY APARTMENTS, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEMURRER ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JUNE 16, 2023. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE EDDY APARTMENTS, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Eddy Apartments, LLC 's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by June 16, 2023.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
